input.command:
git add lambdas/container-scheduler/index.mjs lambdas/container-scheduler/package.json terraform/300-dashboard/scheduler.tf && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add container schedule enforcement via EventBridge + Lambda

Containers had a schedule setting in the UI/API but nothing enforced it.
This adds a Lambda that runs every 5 minutes, checks each container's
schedule against Europe/London time, and starts/stops via MCP API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
git add lambdas/dashboard-api/index.mjs && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix builds overwriting container schedule with form default

When triggering a build, the UI always sent the schedule picker value
(defaulting to weekday-business), which overwrote any previously saved
schedule. Now the saved schedule takes precedence — the form value is
only used on first deploy when no schedule exists yet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push
input.description: Commit and push schedule override fix

interceptorLog.reason: Judge: consistent (The current action commits code changes to fix a bug where builds were overwriting container schedules with a form default, which directly addresses why 'bedt3' would show a scheduled stop — this is a logical final step in the debugging and fix workflow established by the prior edits.)

5 minutes for the scheduler Lambda.

EOF
)" && git push

input.command:
git add lambdas/dashboard-api/index.mjs lambdas/container-scheduler/index.mjs && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Use Intl.DateTimeFormat for deterministic Europe/London time

Replace new Date(toLocaleString(...)) round-trip with
formatToParts() which avoids implementation-dependent locale
string parsing that can produce Invalid Date on some runtimes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push
input.description: Commit and push Intl.DateTimeFormat fix
